/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/VisualNovelTPU.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VisualNovelTPU.dir/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VisualNovelTPU.dir/menu.cpp.o -o VisualNovelTPU  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
